user.description: Sign in with your monagence.reseda.fr account.

error.no_pascs: No contracts are linked to this account.

init.description: Set the electricity price per kWh. The integration will derive cost statistics (reseda:[PRM]_cost_total and per-poste variants) you can wire into the Energy dashboard via 'Use a separate statistic for costs'. Days already imported keep their original price — only days from now on use the new value.
